generated_oml:
instance DigitalShadowSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Virtual sensing component representing the optional digital shadow subset that generates real‑time sensor traces for the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:producedData DigitalShadowSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance DigitalShadowSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DigitalShadowSensor
]

instance DigitalShadowSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Sensor trace data produced by the digital shadow subsystem."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DigitalShadowSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ValidationService
]

instance SimulinkSimulationComponent : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Simulink runtime component that executes block‑diagram models to generate simulation outputs."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SimulinkSimulationDataTransmitted
]

instance SimulinkSimulationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SimulinkSimulationComponent
]

instance SimulationOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑domain response data generated by Simulink block‑diagrams during simulation."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulinkSimulationDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationService
]

instance CADGeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric model derived from CAD exports and integrated as a 3D asset in the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelLibraryEnabler, ExportPipelineEnabler
]

instance SysMLStateMachineModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML v1.7 state machine diagram expressing functional and logical topology of the twin."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelLibraryEnabler, SemanticMappingEnabler
]

instance MontiArcAutomatonModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MontiArc Automaton model capturing behavior expressed in an ADL with state machine extensions."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelLibraryEnabler, SemanticMappingEnabler
]

instance SimulinkBlockDiagramModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink block‑diagram representing analytical and numerical behavior, executed to produce simulation data."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkRuntimeEnabler
]

instance CodeGeneratedCppModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "C++ code generated from SysML IBDs for low‑level embedded control."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CppExecutionEnabler, ModelLibraryEnabler
]

instance CodeGeneratedJavaModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Java code generated from SysML IBDs for low‑level embedded control."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo JavaExecutionEnabler, ModelLibraryEnabler
]

instance ModelLibraryEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Shared model library enabling access to geometric, behavioral, and analytical artefacts across the Digital Twin, linking heterogeneous models through a semantic mapping framework."
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelManagementService, ValidationService
]

instance SemanticMappingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Semantic mapping framework aligning component interfaces and connectors across SysML, MontiArc, and AADL schemas."
    DTDFVocab:enables ValidationService
]

instance ExportPipelineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Automated export pipeline ensuring consistency between geometric, behavioural, and analytical artefacts during twin development."
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelManagementService
]

instance SimulinkRuntimeEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Runtime environment for executing Simulink block‑diagrams within the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance CppExecutionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Execution environment for running generated C++ control code in the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables CodeExecutionService
]

instance JavaExecutionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Execution environment for running generated Java control code in the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables CodeExecutionService
]

instance TraceabilityEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Traceability matrix host ensuring model versioning and traceability across the twin artefacts."
    DTDFVocab:enables ValidationService
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that runs Simulink block‑diagrams to generate analytical and numerical simulation data for quality analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultInsight, UpdateModelFromSimulationAction
]

instance AnalyticalExecutionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that executes analytical models derived from simulation outputs for further processing."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultInsight
]

instance CodeExecutionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that executes generated C++ or Java control code derived from SysML IBDs."
    DTDFVocab:provides CodeExecutionInsight
]

instance ModelManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that maintains the hierarchy of models at each abstraction level and synchronizes code generation with simulations."
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelUpdateInsight
]

instance ValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that validates consistency of models through simulation, model‑based testing, and traceability."
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationInsight
]

instance CodeSimulationSynchronizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that synchronizes generated code with simulation artefacts as models evolve."
    DTDFVocab:provides CodeSyncInsight
]

instance SimulationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight capturing time‑domain response data generated from Simulink block‑diagrams."
]

instance CodeExecutionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating successful execution of generated C++ or Java control code within the Digital Twin."
]

instance ModelUpdateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating that the model hierarchy has been updated based on new simulation results."
]

instance ValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight representing validation of model consistency through simulation and testing."
]

instance CodeSyncInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight capturing synchronization status between generated code and simulation artefacts."
]

instance UpdateModelFromSimulationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic action to integrate simulation output data into the model hierarchy for continuous twinning."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "In the Digital Twin context discussed, the lifecycle is organized into four abstraction layers: requirements, functional architecture, logical architecture, and product/technical layer. Each stage is represented with MBSE tools such as SysML for requirements and functional diagramming, ADLs (ACME, AADL, MontiArc, SysML IBDs) for logical and component‑connector perspectives, and detailed product models at the final layer. Transition between stages is managed by converting textual requirements into diagrammatic functional architecture, then into logical architecture that captures component interconnections, and finally into product‑level models that can be instantiated or simulated. This staged governance allows systematic change management and traceability across the Digital Twin’s development phases."
]
